website_landing_markdown:
# Codex Account Switcher

Switch Codex accounts from your macOS menu bar, without manual auth file juggling.

## Built for heavy Codex users
If you run long desktop + CLI sessions across multiple accounts, this tool keeps account switching fast and predictable.

## Core workflow
1. Save multiple accounts
2. Pick active account in one click
3. Restart Codex / open new CLI session from the same panel
4. Monitor 5-hour + weekly remaining usage per account

## Security model
- Local profile storage with restrictive permissions
- Atomic writes to `~/.codex/auth.json` on switch
- Open source implementation for full auditability

## Current limits
Running sessions do not hot-reload auth; restart/new session is required.

## OSS repo
[View source on GitHub](https://github.com/naveenshaji/codex-account-switcher)
blog_post_markdown:
# Codex Account Switcher: Launch Update + Practical Workflow

After the initial launch draft, this update tightens the message around concrete operator value.

## The real friction
Manual account switching in Codex usually means touching `~/.codex/auth.json`, restarting processes, and losing confidence in active-account state.

## What this app does in practice
- Keeps multiple accounts ready in a menu bar panel
- Switches active account with atomic auth write
- Shows 5-hour and weekly remaining usage per account
- Adds operational shortcuts: restart Codex app, open new CLI session

## Why this matters
For developers running many Codex sessions per day, shaving switching friction compounds quickly and reduces errors.

## Security + transparency
The project is open source and designed for local-first handling of credentials with restrictive permissions.

Repo: https://github.com/naveenshaji/codex-account-switcher

For people managing multiple Codex accounts on macOS: this menu bar tool removes most auth-switching friction and keeps active state visible. Open source: https://github.com/naveenshaji/codex-account-switcher
Codex Account Switcher now emphasizes security + operator workflow clarity in docs/collateral. If you want a no-drama multi-account setup: https://github.com/naveenshaji/codex-account-switcher

reddit_posts.body_markdown:
Quick update to my OSS app **Codex Account Switcher**.

I refined docs and launch collateral to focus on practical workflow steps (switch active account, verify usage windows, restart/open CLI) and clear security assumptions.

If you use Codex heavily across multiple accounts, feedback on real-world edge cases is very welcome.

Repo: https://github.com/naveenshaji/codex-account-switcher
